title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic Skill Creator, and others. The plugins aim to reduce token costs, enable web scraping and media generation, and improve development velocity.
